text.message: You racing that brick port oj? How am I rob here

one for sheep and 1 for wood

i know, but i dont have
why woud i ruin black? then red wins instantly
like reds table talk is insane
oj, why would i cut black road, then red wins instantly
so that means red is talking BS?
do you have an knight blue?
9 wrolls and red gets a road
move robber and 9 rolls, its gg

ok red, keep talking BS, like how i will cut black's road so u instnatly win

even when oj agreed u talk BS

yes i move knight to help u, coz u 9 pts
and i loveBS talker like u

ok BS talker, i will cut black road
what you need to dev oj?

all should listen to red, who says watch out, blue will cut black road

see, u say i lie, but cant say when i did

oh, does that mean wehn u called me a liar and said ive got 3 VP, it was actually u talking BS again?
